context: China's 2025 streaming charts were dominated by nostalgia for early-2000s Mandopop — Jay Chou's back catalog topped Apple Music's year-end chart for mainland China. Faye Wong's 'Wo De Li Wu' was named Mandarin song of 2025 by NetEase, and Zhou Shen remained a dominant force on Billboard's China TME UNI Chart. Douyin viral hits and independent artists rounded out a diverse landscape.

tracks.title: Xian Shuo Ai de Ren Wei Shen Me Xian Li Kai
Tu Po Shang De Gou Wei Cao
